holdings.infoBox: PSCU is an equity ETF with a total of 38 individual holdings. The top holdings are Match Group stock at 8.48%, Lumen Technologies at 7.77%, Madison Square Garden Sports at 6.61%, Versant Media Group at 5.63%, and Iridium Communications at 4.81%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Utilities & Communication Services ETF (PSCU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of small-cap US utilities and telecom services companies, selected from the S&P small-cap 600 Index universe. PSCU was launched on Apr 7, 2010 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: S&P SmallCap 600 Capped Utilities & Telecommunication Services
